message.content:
[
  {
    "dataset_id": "Eurobarometer Trend File 1970-2002",
    "dataset_title": "Eurobarometer Trend File 1970-2002",
    "dataset_category": "Political behaviour and attitudes",
    "dataset_description": "Cross-national trend dataset combining multiple Standard Eurobarometer waves from 1970 to 2002. Covers political attitudes, institutional trust, issue salience, evaluations of government and economy, social values, and selected media use indicators across European countries.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "ISSP 2016 Role of Government V",
    "dataset_title": "ISSP 2016 Role of Government V",
    "dataset_category": "Economic policy, public expenditure and revenue",
    "dataset_description": "International Social Survey Programme module focusing on attitudes toward the role of government, including spending priorities, taxation, welfare, regulation, and responsibilities in social and economic policy.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "ISSP 2006 Role of Government IV",
    "dataset_title": "ISSP 2006 Role of Government IV",
    "dataset_category": "Government, political systems and organisations",
    "dataset_description": "ISSP module examining public views on governmental responsibilities, trust in institutions, public spending, and state–citizen relations across participating countries.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) 2018",
    "dataset_title": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) 2018",
    "dataset_category": "Social behaviour and attitudes",
    "dataset_description": "National general social survey for Germany measuring social and political attitudes, values, social networks, trust, and demographics. Includes modules relevant to social cohesion and political preferences.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) 2021",
    "dataset_title": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) 2021",
    "dataset_category": "Social behaviour and attitudes",
    "dataset_description": "German general social survey capturing contemporary social and political attitudes, values, and behavioral indicators, enabling trend analyses and comparisons with prior ALLBUS waves.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "GLES 2021 Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section (German Federal Election)",
    "dataset_title": "GLES 2021 Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section",
    "dataset_category": "Elections",
    "dataset_description": "Part of the German Longitudinal Election Study. Surveys voters before and after the 2021 Bundestag election on vote choice, campaign exposure, party evaluations, issues, and political participation.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "GLES 2017 Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey",
    "dataset_title": "GLES 2017 Rolling Cross-Section",
    "dataset_category": "Media",
    "dataset_description": "Daily rolling cross-section survey during the 2017 Bundestag election campaign capturing vote intentions, attitudes, and media exposure, enabling analyses of campaign dynamics and information flows.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "Politbarometer (Germany) Cumulative Dataset",
    "dataset_title": "Politbarometer Cumulative Dataset",
    "dataset_category": "Political behaviour and attitudes",
    "dataset_description": "Long-running monthly public opinion series for Germany covering party support, government performance, issues, and political attitudes. The cumulative dataset allows time series analyses across decades.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "ISSP 2014 Citizenship",
    "dataset_title": "ISSP 2014 Citizenship",
    "dataset_category": "Government, political systems and organisations",
    "dataset_description": "ISSP module on citizenship covering political engagement, rights and duties, efficacy, institutional trust, and attitudes toward democracy and governance.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  },
  {
    "dataset_id": "ISSP 2019 Social Inequality V",
    "dataset_title": "ISSP 2019 Social Inequality V",
    "dataset_category": "Economic systems and development",
    "dataset_description": "ISSP module examining perceptions of income distribution, social mobility, equality of opportunity, and policy preferences related to inequality and redistribution.",
    "dataset_host": "GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences"
  }
]
